receta_omelette_queso_003.title: Cheese Omelette
steps: Beat eggs with milk.
Melt butter and pour the mixture.
Add cheese and fold the omelet.
Cook just until the inside is still juicy.

receta_smoothie_platano_avena_004.title: Banana and Oatmeal Smoothie
steps: Blend everything until creamy.
Add more milk if you want it more liquid.

receta_yogur_granola_fruta_005.title: Yogurt with Granola and Fruits
steps: Place yogurt in a bowl.
Add fruit and granola on top.
It serves immediately to maintain the crunch.

receta_tostadas_francesas_006.title: French Toast
steps: Mix eggs, milk, sugar and cinnamon.
Soak the bread 5 seconds per side.
Cook in a pan until golden.

receta_tostadas_palta_007.title: Toasts with avocado
steps: Toast the bread.
Crush the avocado and season.
Spread on bread.

receta_muffins_avena_platano_008.title: Oatmeal and Banana Muffins
steps: Crush the banana and mix with egg.
Add oats and baking powder.
Pour into molds and bake for 15 minutes at 180C.

receta_quesadillas_queso_009.title: Cheese Quesadillas
steps: Fill the tortilla with cheese.
Cook in a pan until melted and golden.

receta_huevos_revueltos_cremosos_010.title: Creamy Scrambled Eggs
steps: Beat the eggs without excessive foam.
Cook over low heat, stirring gently.
Turn off before they dry; they finish curdling on their own.

receta_pudding_chia_012.title: Classic Chia Pudding
steps: Mix chia and milk.
Stir 3 times in the first 10 minutes.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours.

receta_avena_horno_manzana_013.title: Baked Oatmeal with Apple
steps: Mix everything in a bowl.
Pour into a bowl.
Bake 20 to 25 min at 180C.

receta_crepes_sencillos_014.title: Simple Crepes
steps: Mix flour, eggs and milk.
Add the butter.
Cook thin layers in a non-stick pan.

receta_sandwich_jamon_queso_015.title: Grilled Ham and Cheese Sandwich
steps: Assemble the sandwich and spread butter on the outside.
Brown it in a frying pan over medium heat.

receta_yogur_avena_remojada_017.title: Yogurt with Soaked Oats
steps: Mix oats and yogurt the night before.
Add honey when serving.

receta_wrap_huevo_018.title: Egg Wrap
steps: Cook the eggs.
Place everything on the tortilla.
Roll up and serve.

receta_pan_ricotta_miel_019.title: Bread with Ricotta and Honey
steps: Toast the bread.
Spread ricotta and add honey on top.

receta_shakshuka_tradicional_021.title: Complete Traditional Shakshuka
steps: Sauté onion, garlic and pepper for 5 minutes.
Add sauce and spices; cook 8 to 10 minutes.
Make holes and add the eggs.
Cook covered until set.
Decorate with parsley.

receta_croque_madame_022.title: Homemade Croque Madame
receta_croque_madame_022.description: Sandwich with white sauce and egg.
steps: Make white sauce with butter, flour and milk.
Assemble the sandwich with ham and cheese.
Cover with white sauce and gratin for 10 min at 200C.
Fry the egg and place it on top.

receta_huevos_benedictinos_023.title: Simple Eggs Benedict
steps: Toast the bread and place the ham.
Poach the eggs for 3 minutes.
Make the quick Dutch oven in a bain-marie.
Assemble everything.

receta_avena_horno_frutosrojos_024.title: Baked Oatmeal with Red Fruits
steps: Mix oats, milk, egg, honey and vanilla.
Add red fruits.
Bake 25 min at 180C.

receta_frittata_espinaca_queso_025.title: Spinach and Cheese Frittata
steps: Sauté the onion and spinach.
Mix the eggs with the cheese.
Cook for 3 minutes in a pan and 10 minutes in the oven.

receta_burrito_desayuno_027.title: Full Breakfast Burrito
steps: Cook the eggs and potatoes.
Fill and roll.
Brown it in a pan.

receta_bowl_yogur_chia_028.title: Yogurt Bowl with Chia Granola and Honey
steps: Yogurt in bowl, add chia.
Wait 5 min.
Add fruit and granola.

receta_panqueques_americanos_029.title: American Fluffy Pancakes
steps: Mix dry ingredients.
Add egg and milk.
Cook portions until golden.

receta_tostadas_huevo_mollet_030.title: Toasts with Mollet Egg and Avocado
steps: Cook eggs 6 minutes.
Mash the avocado.
Spread on bread.
Place the egg on top.

receta_avena_tradicional_cremosa_031.title: Creamy Traditional Oatmeal
steps: Heat the milk in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the oats and stir constantly.
Cook until it takes on a creamy texture.
Sweeten with honey and add cinnamon before serving.

receta_avena_manzana_canela_032.title: Oatmeal with Apple and Cinnamon
steps: Heat the milk and add the oats.
Add the chopped apple.
Add cinnamon and sugar or honey.
Cook until the apple is soft.

receta_avena_platano_nueces_033.title: Oatmeal with Banana and Walnuts
receta_avena_platano_nueces_033.description: Oatmeal with fruit and nut topping.
steps: Cook the oats in water or milk until thick.
Serve and add the banana and walnuts on top.
Sweeten with honey if you wish.

receta_avena_cacao_034.title: Oatmeal with Cocoa
steps: Cook the oats with the milk over medium heat.
When it starts to thicken, add the cocoa and mix very well.
Sweeten with honey or sugar according to your taste.
Add a pinch of salt and mix.
Cook 1 more minute to integrate flavors.

receta_pancakes_clasicos_035.title: Classic Pancakes
steps: Mix flour, sugar and baking powder.
Add egg and milk; mix without overbeating.
Heat frying pan with butter.
Cook portions until golden brown on both sides.

receta_pancakes_avena_036.title: Oatmeal Pancakes
steps: Mix all the ingredients.
Let it rest for 5 minutes.
Cook small portions in a frying pan over medium heat.
Flip when bubbles appear.

receta_panqueques_platano_037.title: Plantain Pancakes
steps: Blend the banana until it is creamy.
Add the egg and mix.
Add oats and baking powder.
Rest 5 minutes to thicken.
Cook small portions 2 to 3 minutes per side.

receta_pollo_arroz_038.title: Stir-Fried Chicken with Rice
steps: Heat a large skillet with oil over medium heat.
Add onion and sauté for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add garlic and cook 30 seconds.
Add the cubed chicken and cook for 6 to 8 minutes until browned and cooked.
Season with salt, pepper and oregano to taste.
Add the cooked rice and mix well.
Sauté for 2 to 3 minutes to integrate flavors.
Serve hot.

receta_tallarines_bolona_039.title: Noodles with Easy Bolognese Sauce
receta_tallarines_bolona_039.description: Pasta with homemade sauce and meat.
steps: Cook the pasta in salted water following the time on the package. Strain and reserve.
In a frying pan, heat the oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook for 3 minutes.
Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until golden brown (4 to 6 minutes).
Pour the tomato sauce and mix well.
Season with salt, pepper and oregano.
Cook everything together for 5 minutes to integrate flavors.
Mix the sauce with the cooked pasta and serve hot.

receta_lentejas_caseras_040.title: Simple Homemade Lentils
steps: Wash the lentils under cold water.
In a pot, heat a teaspoon of oil.
Sauté the chopped onion, garlic and carrot for 3 minutes.
Add the lentils and mix with the vegetables.
Add the 3 cups of water.
Cook over medium heat for 25 to 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
When they are soft, add salt, cumin and paprika to taste.
Cook for 3 more minutes to integrate flavors.
Serve hot.

receta_pure_carne_041.title: Mashed Potatoes with Ground Meat
steps: Peel the potatoes and cut them into medium pieces.
Put them in a pot with cold water and a pinch of salt.
Cook for 15 to 20 minutes until very soft.
Drain the water and mash the potatoes with a fork or masher.
Add the milk and butter, mix until you obtain a smooth puree.
In a skillet, cook the ground beef for 6 to 8 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon.
Season with salt and pepper.
Serve the puree on a plate and place the meat on top.

receta_pollo_plancha_ensalada_042.title: Grilled Chicken with Salad
steps: Cut the breast so that it is evenly thick.
Season with salt, pepper and a few drops of lemon.
Heat a frying pan over medium heat and cook the chicken for 4 to 5 minutes per side, until golden brown.
Cut the chicken into strips or serve whole.
Wash and cut the lettuce, tomato and cucumber.
Mix the vegetables and serve them with the chicken.
You can add a splash of extra lemon if you want.

receta_arroz_atun_043.title: Rice with Tuna
steps: Place the cooked rice in a large bowl.
Open the can of tuna, drain it and add it to the rice.
Add the corn.
Add a teaspoon of lemon and mix.
If you want more creaminess, add the mayonnaise.
Mix everything gently until integrated.
You can serve it cold or heat it for 1 to 2 minutes in the microwave.

receta_sopa_verduras_044.title: Homemade Vegetable Soup
steps: Peel and cut all the vegetables into medium cubes.
Place them in a pot with the liter of water.
Bring to a boil and cook for 20 to 25 minutes, until all the vegetables are soft.
Add salt and oregano to taste.
Stir and cook 2 more minutes.
Serve hot.

receta_carbonada_045.title: Quick Carbonade
steps: Peel and cut all the vegetables into small cubes.
In a pot, sauté the minced meat for 3 to 4 minutes.
Add the vegetables and mix well.
Add the cup of water.
Cook for 20 minutes over medium heat, until the vegetables are soft.
Season with salt and oregano.
Cook 2 extra minutes to integrate flavors.

receta_tortilla_papas_046.title: Quick Potato Tortilla
steps: If the potatoes are not cooked, boil them for 12 to 15 minutes and cut them into cubes.
In a bowl, lightly beat the eggs with salt and pepper.
Add the potatoes and mix gently.
Heat a non-stick frying pan with a teaspoon of oil.
Pour the mixture and cook for 3 to 4 minutes over medium heat.
Turn the tortilla using a plate and cook 2 more minutes.
Serve hot.

receta_arroz_frito_047.title: Fried Rice with Vegetables
steps: Heat a large frying pan or wok with a teaspoon of oil.
Add the vegetables and sauté for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add the cooked rice and mix well.
Make a space in the center of the pan and crack the egg there.
Stir the egg until cooked, then mix it with the rice.
Add the soy sauce and mix everything for 1 more minute.
Serve hot.

receta_pollo_curry_048.title: Easy Chicken Curry
steps: Heat a frying pan with a splash of oil.
Sauté the onion for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, 5 to 6 minutes.
Add the curry and mix to coat the chicken.
Pour the cream or coconut milk.
Cook for 5 minutes over medium-low heat until thickened.
Add salt to taste and serve.

receta_pasta_pesto_049.title: Homemade Pesto Pasta
steps: Cook the pasta in salted water according to the instructions on the package.
In a blender or processor, place the basil, garlic, oil and a pinch of salt.
Process until you obtain a smooth green paste (pesto).
Strain the pasta and mix it with the pesto immediately to absorb the flavor.
Serve hot.

receta_garbanzos_guiso_050.title: Chickpea Stew
steps: Heat a frying pan or small pot with a teaspoon of oil.
Sauté the onion for 2 minutes.
Add the tomato and cook 2 to 3 minutes more.
Add the chickpeas and mix.
Season with salt and paprika.
Cook for 5 to 7 minutes until the flavors integrate.
Serve hot.

receta_salpicon_pollo_051.title: Chicken Salpicon
steps: Place the shredded chicken in a large bowl.
Add the chopped tomato, lettuce and corn.
In a glass, mix the lemon juice, oil and a pinch of salt.
Pour the dressing over the ingredients in the bowl.
Stir gently until everything is integrated.
Serve immediately to maintain freshness.

receta_papas_horno_052.title: Baked Potatoes with Spices
steps: Preheat the oven to 200C.
Wash the potatoes well and cut them into wedges.
Place the potatoes in a bowl and add the oil, oregano, paprika and salt.
Mix to coat all the segments well with the spices.
Place the potatoes on a baking sheet, in a single layer.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden and crisp.
Serve hot.

receta_chuletas_plancha_053.title: Grilled Chops with Rice
steps: Dry the chop with absorbent paper so that it browns better.
Sprinkle salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Place the chop in the pan and cook for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and cooked through the center.
Serve the chop along with the cooked rice.

receta_cazuela_simple_054.title: Simple Casserole
steps: Place the chicken in a large pot and cover it with the liter of water.
Add the salt and cook for 10 minutes from when it starts to boil.
Cut the potato, pumpkin and carrot into medium pieces.
Add all the vegetables to the pot and cook for 15 more minutes.
Add the noodles and cook another 10 minutes or until soft.
Adjust the salt and serve hot.

receta_pollo_mostaza_055.title: Mustard Chicken
steps: Cut the breast into two fillets so it cooks faster.
Season both sides with salt and pepper.
Heat a frying pan with the oil over medium heat.
Place the chicken and cook 4 to 5 minutes per side until golden.
Lower the heat and add the mustard and cream directly to the pan.
Mix well and cook 2 more minutes so that the sauce thickens and covers the chicken.
Serve with rice, pasta or salad.

receta_salmon_plancha_056.title: Grilled Salmon with Lemon
steps: Season the salmon on both sides with salt and pepper.
Heat a frying pan over medium heat and add the oil.
Place the salmon skin side down (if it has one).
Cook for 3 to 4 minutes without moving it so that it browns well.
Turn the steak over and cook 2 to 3 minutes more.
Remove from heat and squeeze the lemon over it.
Serve immediately.

receta_pasta_tomate_057.title: Pasta with Homemade Tomato Sauce
steps: Cook the pasta according to package instructions and set aside.
In a frying pan, heat the oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped garlic and cook for 30 seconds, without letting it burn.
Add the crushed tomato, salt and oregano.
Cook the sauce for 10 minutes to thicken and take on flavor.
Mix the sauce with the cooked pasta.
Serve hot.

receta_sandwich_pollo_058.title: Chicken and Avocado Sandwich
steps: Place the shredded chicken in a small bowl.
Mash the avocado with a fork and add a pinch of salt and a few drops of lemon.
Open the bread in half.
Spread the avocado on one of the halves.
Place the chicken on top and cover the sandwich.
Serve immediately.

receta_sopa_tomate_059.title: Quick Tomato Soup
steps: In a small pot, heat the oil.
Add the garlic and cook for just 20 seconds.
Add the crushed tomato and water.
Stir and add salt and oregano.
Cook for 8 to 10 minutes over medium heat.
Serve hot.

receta_omelette_jamon_060.title: Ham and Cheese Omelette
steps: In a bowl, beat the eggs with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Heat the oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
Pour in the eggs and let them set a little.
Add the ham and cheese on top.
Fold the omelet carefully and cook 1 more minute.
Serve hot.

receta_tostadas_huevo_061.title: Toast with Scrambled Egg
steps: Toast the bread.
In a bowl, beat the eggs with a pinch of salt.
Heat the butter in a frying pan and add the eggs.
Stir slowly over low heat until creamy.
Place the eggs on the toast and serve.

receta_sandwich_atun_065.title: Tuna Sandwich
steps: Mix the tuna with the mayonnaise.
Place the lettuce on a slice of bread.
Add the tuna mixture on top.
Close with the other slice.

receta_sopa_pollo_066.title: Quick Chicken Soup
steps: Heat the water in a small pot.
Add the chicken and noodles.
Add salt and oregano.
Cook 8 to 10 minutes until the noodles are soft.
Serve hot.

receta_pan_ricotta_tomate_067.title: Bread with Ricotta and Tomato
steps: Toast the bread.
Spread the ricotta on each slice.
Place the tomato slices on top.
Season with salt and oregano.

receta_huevo_duro_ensalada_068.title: Hard Boiled Eggs with Salad
steps: Put the eggs in a pot and cover them with water.
Cook for 10 minutes from boiling.
Peel and cut the eggs into halves.
Prepare a salad with the lettuce and tomato.
Dress with oil, lemon and salt.
Add the eggs on top.

receta_crema_zapallo_070.title: Easy Pumpkin Cream
steps: Place the squash in a pot with the water.
Cook for 12 to 15 minutes until soft.
Blend with a mixer or fork.
Add the milk and mix.
Add salt and heat for 2 more minutes.

receta_sopa_huevo_073.title: Egg Soup
steps: Boil the water with the salt.
Beat the egg in a glass.
Pour the egg slowly into the boiling water while stirring.
Cook 1 more minute.
Add parsley and serve.

receta_pan_mantequilla_082.title: Bread with Butter and Ham
steps: Toast the bread.
Spread butter while it is still hot.
Place the ham on top and serve.

receta_charquican_casero_088.title: Easy Charquican for 1
steps: In a pot, sauté the onion for 2 minutes with a teaspoon of oil.
Add the ground beef and cook for 5 minutes, stirring.
Add potato, pumpkin, carrot and corn. Mix.
Add the water, salt, cumin and paprika.
Cook over medium heat for 20 min.
When everything is soft, partially flatten it with a spoon.
Serve hot.

receta_tomatican_089.title: Homemade Tomato
steps: In a frying pan, heat oil and sauté the onion for 3 min.
Add the meat and cook until browned.
Add the tomato and corn.
Season with salt and oregano.
Cook covered 10 min.

receta_papas_coctel_090.title: Merken Golden Potatoes
steps: Preheat the oven to 200C.
Mix the potatoes with oil, merken and salt.
Put them on separate trays.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden.

receta_pescado_mantequilla_091.title: Fish Fillet in Butter
steps: Season the fish with salt and pepper.
In a hot pan, melt the butter.
Cook the fish 3 minutes per side.
Add parsley at the end and serve.

receta_reineta_tomate_093.title: Baked Reineta with Tomato
steps: Preheat oven to 200C.
Place the pippin on a tray.
Add tomato, onion, oil, salt and oregano.
Bake 15 min.

receta_bowl_quinoa_098.title: Quinoa Bowl with Vegetables and Chicken
steps: Cook the chicken for 5 minutes in a frying pan.
Assemble the bowl: quinoa, broccoli, carrot and chicken.
Dress with oil, lemon and salt.

receta_bowl_garbanzos_101.title: Chickpea and Avocado Bowl
steps: Place chickpeas in a bowl.
Add diced tomato and avocado.
Alina with lemon, oil and salt.

receta_salmon_horno_102.title: Baked Salmon with Spinach
steps: Preheat the oven to 200C.
Put the salmon on a tray and season with salt and pepper.
On the side add the spinach with oil.
Bake 12 to 15 min.

receta_zapallo_spaghetti_103.title: Italian Zucchini Noodles with Chicken
steps: Sauté the chicken 5 min.
Add the Italian squash and cook 2 min.
Add the tomato sauce.
Cook for 3 minutes and serve.

receta_tofu_salteado_105.title: Stir-fried Tofu with Vegetables
steps: Sauté tofu 3 min.
Add vegetables and cook 5 min.
Add a splash of soy sauce.
Mix and serve.

receta_shirataki_106.title: Stir-Fried Shirataki Noodles
steps: Wash and drain the shirataki.
Sauté mushrooms 2 min.
Add spinach and noodles.
Add soy sauce and mix 2 min.

receta_budin_verduras_107.title: Individual Vegetable Pudding
steps: Mix everything in a bowl.
Pour into small mold.
Bake 15 to 18 min at 180C.

receta_chaparritas_caseras_108.title: Baked Shorties
steps: Cut the dough into rectangles.
Place a Viennese and cheese.
Roll up and close well.
Brush with egg.
Bake 15 min at 200C.

receta_pizza_omelette_113.title: Omelette Pizza
steps: Beat the eggs and cook for 2 minutes over low heat.
Add sauce, cheese and oregano.
Cover and cook 2 more minutes.

receta_sopa_crema_papa_118.title: Potato and Leek Cream
steps: In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the leek and cook 3 minutes.
Add the potato and mix.
Add the water and cook 12 to 15 minutes.
Grind with a mini blender or step very well.
Add the milk, salt and pepper.
Heat for 2 to 3 more minutes and serve.

receta_pescado_limon_horno_119.title: Baked Fish with Lemon and Garlic
steps: Preheat the oven to 200C.
Place the fish on a tray.
Rub the oil, garlic, salt and pepper over it.
Put the lemon slices on the fillet.
Bake for 12 to 15 minutes until firm and opaque.

receta_guiso_zapallo_carne_120.title: Pumpkin Stew with Meat
steps: Sauté the onion in the oil for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add the meat and cook until browned.
Add the pumpkin and mix.
Add the water, salt and cumin.
Cook 15 to 18 minutes.
Mash lightly to thicken.

receta_revoltillo_camaron_121.title: Shrimp Scramble with Vegetables
steps: Heat the oil in a frying pan.
Sauté the onion and pepper for 3 minutes.
Add the shrimp and cook 2 minutes.
Beat the eggs with salt and pepper.
Pour over the pan and cook, stirring until set.

receta_tortilla_champinones_122.title: Mushroom Omelet
steps: Sauté the mushrooms and onion for 3 to 4 minutes.
Beat the eggs with salt and pepper.
Add the eggs to the pan.
Cook for 3 minutes on one side, turn and cook for 2 more minutes.

receta_omelette_espinaca_124.title: Spinach and Cheese Omelette
steps: Beat the eggs with salt and pepper.
Sauté the spinach for 1 minute.
Add the eggs to the pan.
Add cheese, fold and cook 1 to 2 minutes more.

receta_sopa_cebolla_125.title: Homemade Onion Soup
steps: Melt the butter in a pot.
Cook the onion for 8 to 10 minutes until golden.
Add the water and broth.
Cook 10 minutes.
Season and serve hot.

receta_pan_plano_casero_126.title: Homemade Flat Bread
steps: Mix flour and salt.
Add water and oil; knead 2 minutes.
Divide into 2 balls and flatten with your hands.
Cook in a pan for 2 to 3 minutes per side.

receta_salmon_cocotte_127.title: Salmon Cocotte
steps: Place the salmon in a small pan.
Add onion, lemon and water around.
Cover the pan.
Cook over low heat for 10 to 12 minutes.
Serve hot.

receta_chips_zanahoria_128.title: Baked Carrot Chips
steps: Preheat the oven to 180C.
Cut the carrots into thin slices.
Mix them with oil, salt, paprika and oregano.
Put them on a tray without covering them.
Bake 12 to 15 minutes until crispy.
If you want, sprinkle cheese when you take them out.

receta_garbanzos_crujientes_129.title: Crunchy Spiced Chickpeas
steps: Preheat the oven to 200C.
Dry the chickpeas well.
Mix them with oil and spices.
Bake them for 25 minutes, moving the tray halfway through.
Sprinkle sesame if you want.

receta_pan_plano_snack_130.title: Homemade Crackers with Seeds
steps: Mix flour, salt and all the seeds.
Add water and oil; forms a mass.
Stretches very thin.
Cut into squares or triangles.
Bake for 10 to 12 min at 200C until golden.

receta_barras_avena_131.title: Oatmeal Bars with Nuts and Fruit
steps: Step on the banana well.
Mix with oats, honey, walnuts and cinnamon.
Add raisins if you want.
Flatten the mixture on a tray.
Bake 18 min at 180C.
Cool and cut into bars.

receta_crocantes_manzana_132.title: Apple Chips with Cinnamon
steps: Cut the apple into thin slices.
Mix cinnamon and sugar (if using).
Sprinkle over the slices.
Bake at 110C for 1 hour, rotating halfway through.

receta_chocolate_frito_133.title: Banana Bites with Chocolate and Walnuts
steps: Cut the banana into 2 cm slices.
Melt the chocolate in the microwave or double boiler.
Dip each slice in chocolate.
Place walnuts on top.
Refrigerate 10 to 15 minutes.

receta_mix_semillas_134.title: Mix of Roasted Seeds with Chili
steps: Toast everything in a frying pan over medium heat for 3 to 4 minutes.
Add salt and chili.
Chill before eating.

receta_tomates_cherry_asados_135.title: Roasted Cherry Tomatoes with Garlic
steps: Mix tomatoes with oil, garlic, salt and pepper.
Bake 15 to 20 min at 200C.

receta_popcorn_casero_136.title: Homemade Flavored Popcorn
steps: Put oil in a pot over medium heat.
Add corn, cover and let it explode.
Season with whatever you want while it is warm.

receta_hummus_basico_137.title: Homemade Hummus with Sesame
steps: Step on the chickpeas.
Add oil, lemon, salt and sesame.
Mix until creamy.
Adjust with water if necessary.

receta_rollitos_pepino_138.title: Cucumber Rolls with Cream Cheese
steps: Cut the cucumber into long slices.
Mix cream cheese with herbs and lemon.
Spread each sheet and roll.

receta_pan_plano_pizza_139.title: Mini Pizzas on Homemade Bread
steps: Mix flour, water, salt and oil.
Knead for 1 min and flatten fine.
Cook in a pan for 1 to 2 minutes per side.
Add sauce, cheese and oregano.
Bake 8 to 10 min at 200C.

receta_queso_pan_143.title: Pan Seared Cheese with Homemade Bread
steps: Mix the flour with water and salt and form a flat bread.
Cook in a pan for 2 to 3 minutes per side.
In another skillet, brown the cheese for 1 to 2 minutes per side.
Serve with the bread.

receta_bolas_energia_144.title: Energy Balls
steps: Mix everything until it forms dough.
Gun balls.
Refrigerate 10 minutes.

receta_cereal_casero_146.title: Homemade Toasted Cereal
steps: Mix oats, honey, oil and nuts.
Add the seeds.
Toast in a pan for 6 to 8 min.
Chill to make it crispy.

receta_sandwich_pepino_147.title: Cucumber, Cream Cheese and Herb Sandwich
steps: Mix cream cheese with chives and lemon.
Spread the bread.
Add cucumber.
Close and serve.
